This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-rj4c-r689-cm87. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
Multiple out-of-bounds write vulnerabilities exist in the ORCA format nAtoms functionality of Open Babel 3.1.1 and master commit 530dbfa3. A specially-crafted malformed file can lead to arbitrary code execution. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.nAtoms calculation wrap-around, leading to a small buffer allocation", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-g8f4-g673-rfw2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T17:49:32Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g8f4-g673-rfw2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-g8f4-g673-rfw2"}], "nvd_published_at": "2023-07-21T21:15:10Z", "published_at": "2023-07-21T21:30:32Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-46289", "https://talosintelligence.com/vulnerability_reports/TALOS-2022-1665", "https://www.talosintelligence.com/vulnerability_reports/TALOS-2022-1665", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g8f4-g673-rfw2"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Open Babel has out-of-bounds write in ORCA nAtoms parser", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T17:49:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-g8f4-g673-rfw2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "openbabel"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-01T17:49:32Z"}
